title: Ushijima the Loan Shark 2
original_title: 闇金ウシジマくん Part2
overview: Ushijima runs Kaukau Fiance, a black market lending agency which scourges its clients with interest rates as high as 50% for 10 days. Ushijima chases down his debtors, who normally come from the bottom of society, with ruthless efficacy.

trailers.title: 映画『闇金ウシジマくん Part2』予告編
